attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SOEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID
,SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,SOEP.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,SOEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,SOEP.SAV_ID
,SOEP.SPLIT_PERCENT
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,SOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,SOEP.START_DATE
,SOEP.STATUS_CODE
,SOEP.CREATION_DATE
,SOEP.USER_NAME
,SOEP.VALIDATION_DATE
,SOEP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,SOEP.BATCH_ID,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS SOEP
WHERE SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_GEO_ACCT_ENRCHMNT_POS_TRX_LN WGAP
WHERE WGAP.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT=SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID)

SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS SOEP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
ON SOEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SOEP.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
WHERE SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'

UNION

SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VALIDATED_CUST_PARTY_KEY,
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,	
'I'			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS SOEP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NP
ON SOEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SOEP.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
WHERE SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT'

SELECT
EOEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID
,EOEP.POS_TRANS_ID
,EOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE
,EOEP.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE
,EOEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID
,EOEP.SAV_ID
,EOEP.SPLIT_PERCENT
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_BE_ID
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_GEO_ID
,EOEP.PGTMV_PARTY_COUNTRY_ID
,EOEP.START_DATE
,EOEP.STATUS_CODE
,EOEP.CREATION_DATE
,EOEP.USER_NAME
,EOEP.VALIDATION_DATE
,EOEP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE
,EOEP.BATCH_ID
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS EOEP
WHERE EOEP.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'
AND EOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT' AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PARTIES_EXT_POS SOEP
WHERE SOEP.POS_TRANS_ID=EOEP.POS_TRANS_ID
AND SOEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE = 'GEO_ACCOUNT')
